description:
Pyconify is a wrapper for the Iconify API. Iconify is a versatile icon
framework that includes 100+ icon sets with more than 100,000 icons from
FontAwesome, Material Design Icons, DashIcons, Feather Icons, EmojiOne,
Noto Emoji and many other open source icon sets.
name: py-pyconify

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
